title: Verify existing implementation of isTokenExpired
description: The isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean function already exists in src/auth/token-utils.ts and decodes JWT to check the exp claim. Tests in src/auth/token-utils.test.ts cover: valid non-expired token, expired token, invalid format, missing exp claim, and refresh token near expiry. All 5 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JwtService uses same base64url encoding/decoding pattern for JWT handling
Utility module pattern - single-function files in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts files
